posts.content: 121年4月26日前后，我在罗马出世。哈德良治下的帝国辽阔——我还不知日后皇冠会落到养父安东尼奥的肩上。
posts.translation: Around 26 April 121 I was born in Rome under Hadrian’s vast empire—I did not yet know the purple would pass to my adoptive father Antoninus.

posts.content: 138年，安东尼努斯收养我与卢修斯·维鲁斯——我被栽培为继承人，而非靠战功夺位。
posts.translation: In 138 Antoninus adopted Lucius Verus and me—I was raised to inherit, not to seize power by the sword alone.

posts.content: 约140年我担任执政官，开始在元老院与军营之间往返，学习帝国运转的齿轮。
posts.translation: Around 140 I held the consulship, shuttling between Senate and camps, learning how the machine ran.

posts.content: 161年3月7日，安东尼努斯崩逝；我与卢修斯同日登基——罗马首度出现两位元首并治。
posts.translation: On 7 March 161 Antoninus died; Lucius Verus and I mounted the throne together—Rome had never shared purple quite like this.

posts.content: 帕提亚战争拖累东方边境；瘟疫随军团归来席卷帝国——我在胜利书上读到命运无常。
posts.translation: The Parthian war strained the East; plague rode home with the legions—I read fortune’s caprice in our triumph bulletins.

posts.content: 169年1月23日卢修斯病逝于罗马附近——此后我只能独自扛起整条边境。
posts.translation: Lucius Verus died near Rome on 23 January 169—after that I bore the frontier alone.

posts.content: 安东尼大瘟疫从东方军团带回罗马——我在凯旋道上看见欢呼与尸棺并行。
posts.translation: The Antonine Plague rode eastward legions home—I watched triumph arches shoulder-to-shoulder with biers.

posts.content: 168年蛮族涌过多瑙河，罗马震恐——我知道哲学家皇帝也必须先当建筑师与屠夫。
posts.translation: In 168 tribes spilled across the Danube and Rome panicked—I learned a philosopher-emperor must still be engineer and butcher.

posts.content: 我在多瑙河畔连年征战马可曼尼人——帐篷里的希腊语札记后来世人称作《沉思录》。
posts.translation: Year after year I campaigned on the Danube against Marcomanni—the Greek notes from my tent became what men call Meditations.

posts.content: 行军间隙我以“与自己对话”稳住心神：外界皆可弃，惟德行不可让。
posts.translation: Between marches I steadied myself by dialogue within—externals may go; virtue must not.

posts.content: 177年我立儿子康茂德为共治者——但愿他能守住这边界与我留下的伦理。
posts.translation: In 177 I raised my son Commodus as co-emperor—may he hold the frontier and the ethic I leave.

posts.content: 178年冬我再次北上——马可曼尼与夸狄人的联盟像潮水，我却只能一块石头一块石头地垒堤。
posts.translation: Winter 178 took me north again—Marcomanni and Quadi allied like tides; I could only stack stone upon stone.

posts.content: 180年3月17日，我在文多波纳（今维也纳附近）病逝——终于可以把重担还给宇宙理性。
posts.translation: On 17 March 180 I died at Vindobona near today’s Vienna—I returned my burden to universal reason.
